channel.title: Blog on Durre
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Durre

item.title: Hello, World!
item.description:
Welcome to my new site! I’m excited to finally have a place to share my thoughts and projects.

Why I Started This Blog

Writing helps me think more clearly. By putting ideas into words, I’m forced to really understand them — or admit that I don’t.

What to Expect

I plan to write about things I’m working on, things I’m learning, and the occasional random thought that seems worth sharing.

item.title: Getting Started with Hugo
item.description:
Hugo is one of the fastest static site generators available. Here’s why I chose it for this site.

Speed

Hugo builds sites in milliseconds, even for sites with thousands of pages. There’s no runtime to spin up — it just outputs static HTML files.

Simplicity

No database. No server-side code. Just Markdown files, templates, and a single binary.

Flexibility

Hugo’s templating system is powerful enough for complex sites, yet simple enough to get started quickly. The theme system makes it easy to customize the look and feel.
